title: Excretion Without Honor or Humanity
overview: Panty & Stocking have to go into the nasty Daten City sewers to find a Ghost that is eating people in the bathroom.

title: Death Race 2010
overview: Panty & Stocking have to fight against a Ghost in a race of death.

title: The Turmoil of the Beehive
overview: Panty & Stocking infiltrate a school to discover the secret of the disappearing students.

title: Sex and Daten City
overview: Panty & Stocking are invited by a movie director to star in a movie about their Ghost-killing adventures.

title: Catfight Club
overview: After Panty eats Stocking's special pudding, the two get into a fight which jeopardizes a mission against a Wolf and Riding Hood Combo Ghost.

title: Pulp Addiction
overview: The Ghosts of wasted sperm take over a paper plant, causing a shortage of tissues for men to relieve themselves with.

title: Diet Syndrome
overview: When Stocking gets slightly overweight, she goes on an obsessive diet with no such luck. However, she ends up getting fatter, eventually turning into a giant the next day, revealed to be the work of a Ghost.

title: High School Nudical
overview: Daten High holds a lingerie run, in which students race in their underwear. The run is soon interrupted by a Ghost that eats everyone's underwear, including Panty and Stocking's weapons.

title: Raiders of the Nasal Dark
overview: As a strange pollen causes everyone in town to start picking their noses in ecstasy, Panty and Stocking are invited to a blimp party by Oscar H Genius. However, he turns out to be a Booger Ghost planning to ram into the moon using collective nosebleeds.

title: Vomiting Point
overview: In the glum area of Little Tokyo, an old office worker named Tarao is forced by his co-workers to drink a mountain of beer and ends up creating a Vomit Ghost.

title: Les Diaboliques
overview: The school is taken over by the demon sisters, Scanty and Kneesocks (the daughters of the mayor), and Panty and Stocking aren't pleased with the new changes they have made. In order to get their revenge, they team up with a Loser Ghost, who leads them to an underground factory where the demon sisters are producing Fake Ghosts. Whilst Brief escapes with the Ghoststone powering the factory, Panty and Stocking fight against the demons sisters.

title: Transhomers
overview: When warring robots from outer space land in Daten City, Panty & Stocking eat their cores and become robots themselves to carry out their sibling feud.

title: The Stripping
overview: After Garterbelt gets angry at Panty & Stocking for wasting money, the girls make a bet to try and earn $3,000,000 in three days. When finding a job doesn't work, they go to a casino which is secretly being run by Scanty and Kneesocks.

title: ... of the Dead
overview: Panty and Stocking find themselves against a horde of zombies who are immune to their angelic weapons.

title: An Angry Ghost
overview: Panty and Stocking are put on trial for the supposed murder of a friendly Ghost and end up with a monkey as their defendant.

title: Angels in Swimwear
overview: When Scanty and Kneesocks buy the public beach for their vacation sport, Panty and Stocking challenge them to a volleyball match to get it back.

title: Ghost: A Vision of Daten City
overview: Stocking finds herself falling in love with a rude and flatulent Ghost, much to Panty's surprise.

title: Inner Brief
overview: Panty and Stocking get shrunk by some heavenly drugs and end up stuck inside Brief's body.

title: Chuck to the Future
overview: The first short revolving around Panty and Stocking's pet sidekick, Chuck.

title: Chuck to the Future Part 2
overview: The second short revolving around Panty and Stocking's pet sidekick, Chuck.

title: Chuck to the Future Part 3
overview: The third short revolving around Panty and Stocking's pet sidekick, Chuck.

title: HELP! We Are Angels!
overview: A music video of the characters singing D City Rock feat. Debra Zeer.

title: Once Upon a Time in Garterbelt
overview: Panty and Stocking find Garterbelt's diary and learn of his past life as a crime lord before going through several trials set by God.

title: Nothing to Room
overview: Panty and Stocking spend the day in their room, talking about their aims and being deprived of food.

title: D.C. Confidential
overview: Scanty and Kneesocks report the results of their unsuccessful battles with Panty and Stocking to their father and Mayor of Daten City, Corset.

title: Panty + Brief
overview: After collecting the necessary Heaven Coins, Stocking manages to return to Heaven. However, due to her erratic sex life, Panty is forced to stay behind and redo her quota, with Garterbelt forbidding her from having sex. She and Brief go to a party, where a devious plan is being concocted by Corset and the Sisters, and Panty finds herself losing her angelic powers.

title: Bitch Girls
overview: Panty is kicked out by Garterbelt for the loss of her powers, but he secretly helps persuade her, with assistance from her grandmother, to stop Corset from using Brief to unlock Hell's Gate using Hell's Monkey. Panty has sex with Brief, breaking her hymen and restoring her powers. Stocking returns from Heaven and helps Panty take on Corset and the demon sisters.

title: Bitch Girls: 2 Bitch
overview: Brief falls onto Hell's Gate and accidentally unlocks it with Hell's Monkey, unleashing a massive Ghost that begins destroying Daten City. Corset fights and kills Garterbelt and proceeds to merge with the Ghost and try to invade Heaven. Panty and Stocking find a credit card hidden in Garterbelt's afro and use it to buy a device that summons their mother, who seemingly destroys Corset and forces the Ghost back into Hell's Gate, which is sealed by Chuck. Garterbelt returns to life in order to continue watching over Panty and Stocking, who are forced to remain on the surface again due to maxing out his credit card. As soon as they return home, Stocking promptly slices Panty to pieces, revealing herself to be a demon working with Corset, who respawns from Brief's penis.
